nasb.text: the pure gold lampstand, with its arrangement of lamps and all its utensils, and the oil for the light;

esv.text: the lampstand of pure gold and its lamps with the lamps set and all its utensils, and the oil for the light;

cnv.text: 純金的燈臺與燈盞，就是擺列在燈臺上的燈盞和燈臺上的一切器具，以及點燈用的油；

ccb.text: 纯金的灯台、灯盏、灯台的一切器具、灯油；
